name: Love Destiny 2
overview: Picking up after Karaket's story in 17th century Ayutthaya, life moves on, weaving a tapestry of present day reality. 21st century Phutthan uncovers an ancient manuscript and is transported back in time where she clashes with and falls for Rit—Karaket’s son. Finally, revealing why she is destined to repeat a weary journey from one living to the next, over and over. Can their love break the vicious karmic cycle?

trailers.title: [Teaser] ละคร พรหมลิขิต (Love Destiny2) :: Full Version [Engsub]
